news.headline: Almonty Industries reports fiscal year 2024 financial results: Revenue $28.8M, Income from Mining Operations $2.0M, Expenses $8.9M.
news.summary: In Toronto, Almonty Industries Inc. (TSX: AII / ASX: AII / OTCQX: ALMTF / Frankfurt: ALI), a top global tungsten concentrate producer, has revealed its fiscal year 2024 financial results. Figures are in Canadian dollars. For the fiscal year concluding on Jan. 31, revenue surged by 28.0% to $28.8 million from $22.5 million in 2023. Income from Mining Operations saw a significant spike of 81.8%, rising to $2.0 million from $1.1 million. Operating Expenses for the year were at $8.9 million.

news.headline: Chengdu showcases creative industries at 2025 World Conference on Cultural Industry, held on March 21-22, highlighting its cultural roots and opportunities.
news.summary: In Chengdu, China on March 22, 2025, the city known for its rich cultural heritage demonstrated its strength in creative industries at the 2025 World Conference on Cultural Industry from March 21 to 22. The event highlighted Chengdu's increasing influence in this sector.

news.headline: Taiwan Sees 41 People's Liberation Army aircraft crossed median line and entered Air Defense Identification Zone
Performance of Communication Services sector and industry can be monitored on Bloomberg.
Hudson’s Bay in CCAA with revised liquidation plan, temporarily excluding 6 stores; court approved extensions.
news.summary: In Toronto, Hudson’s Bay Company ULC, which includes Hudson’s Bay retail stores and TheBay.com, disclosed updates regarding its Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act proceedings after receiving extensions approved by the court. The Ontario Superior Court of Justice has authorized the company to move forward with a modified liquidation plan, with six stores temporarily removed from the initial closure list. This decision marks a significant development in the CCAA process for the company.

news.headline: 532K migrants in US to lose legal status under Trump administration - report.

Surge in leveraged ETFs tied to 'Squid Game' ends in bust in 2024.
Law firm Paul Weiss, targeted by Trump, settles conflict. Backlash from legal community. Many condemn deal.
news.summary: A prominent law firm, Paul Weiss, which was targeted by President Trump, has recently reached an agreement to settle a dispute. This has sparked backlash from numerous individuals within the legal community. The deal, the terms of which have not been disclosed, has generated significant criticism from legal experts. The development surrounding the conflict resolution has raised questions and concerns, with many expressing disapproval over the way the situation has been handled.

news.headline: Experts warn Trump’s proposal to shift student loans to SBA could lead to chaos due to lack of infrastructure.
Law firm Paul Weiss, targeted by Trump, settles conflict. Legal profession criticizes deal made with the President.
news.summary: The law firm Paul Weiss, which was targeted by President Trump, has agreed to settle the dispute. The deal has sparked condemnation within the legal community.

news.headline: Damon Inc. closes $16.5M public offering, enhancing balance sheet for revenue strategy. (Character count: 94)
news.summary: Damon Inc., a company specializing in electric motorcycles and personal mobility products, recently announced a transaction on March 21, 2025, which will significantly bolster their balance sheet. The move, involving the purchase of an undisclosed entity, is expected to boost the company's position and facilitate the execution of a multi-vertical revenue strategy. Trading under the ticker symbol DMN on the NASDAQ, Damon aims to leverage this development to further its growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Eglet, Kemp, and Parker win multi-billion-dollar verdict against Real Water in landmark case in Las Vegas.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, in Las Vegas, a landmark legal win was achieved by Robert Eglet from Eglet Law, Will Kemp from Kemp Jones, LLP, and Theodore Parker from Parker Nelson Associates. They successfully obtained a groundbreaking multi-billion-dollar judgment against Real Water, Inc. This historic verdict represents one of the largest in legal history and signifies a significant triumph for the plaintiffs.

news.headline: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. announces March distribution for Faircourt Fund (CBOE:FGX).
news.summary: Faircourt Asset Management Inc., acting as Manager of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE:FGX), reported today that a monthly distribution will be issued for shareholders of the Fund. The distribution is set for March 21, 2025.

news.headline: CORRECTED: CUPE releases summaries of 9 education settlements; key changes include 1.25% increase on Jun 1, 2023 and $1.10/hr or 3% increase on Sept 1, 2027.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) has released summaries of nine settled and ratified agreements for education support workers. In the "CUPE 3550 (Edmonton Public Schools)" section, corrections were made to the rates. The percentage for Jun 1, 2023 is now 1.25% (changed from 1.75%), and the rate changes for Sept 1, 2027 are $1.10/hr or 3% (whichever is higher) instead of $1.25/hr or 3% (whichever is higher). These adjustments were included in the updated release.

news.headline: IDC Overseas, Ltd. has completed its Exchange Offer for 9.0% Notes due 2026; ISIN: XS2590265471.
news.summary: Today, IDC OVERSEAS, LTD. revealed its plan to launch an Exchange Offer for all of its existing 9.0% Notes due 2026 (ISIN: XS2590265471; Common Code: 259026547). This offer extends to all outstanding notes. The company is based in Tortola, British Virgin Islands.

news.headline: Twitter icon fetches close to $35,000 in recent auction.
Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico refinances credit line with Citibanamex for $40 million, extending maturity by 6 months.
news.summary: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on March 21, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) has successfully refinanced a credit facility with Banco Nacional de México, S.A. ("Citibanamex") for USD$40.0 million, extending the maturity by an additional 6 months with the same financial institution. The interest will be paid monthly at a variable rate of SOFR plus 25 basis points, without fees. The principal payment is scheduled for September 18, 2025.

news.headline: 8,049 DOs secure residency positions, setting a new record on Match Day for American Osteopathic Association.
news.summary: In a historic moment on Match Day, the American Osteopathic Association revealed that a remarkable 8,049 osteopathic (DO) medical students and graduates have secured placements into postgraduate year 1 (PGY1) training. This achievement sets a new record for osteopathic residency placements, underscoring the continued growth and success in the field of osteopathic medicine. The announcement was made on March 21, 2025, marking a significant milestone for the organization and the aspiring medical professionals who have embarked on this journey.

news.headline: Trump Admin plans to reopen detention centers for immigrant children, sparking controversy.
news.summary: In the latest reports, it has been stated that the economy grew by 4.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. This marks a substantial increase from the previous quarter's growth rate of 2.7%. The unemployment rate has also dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant rise, with the main index increasing by 8% in the last month alone. The government has announced plans for further investment in infrastructure, with a proposed budget of $50 billion aimed at improving transportation and communication networks. Experts predict continued growth in the coming months, despite global economic uncertainties.

news.headline: Analysis of recent critical remarks directed at billionaire Elon Musk amidst his rise to prominence.
Ball Corporation sells Ball Aluminum Cup® assets, forming 49:51 joint venture with Ayna.AI. Leading provider of sustainable aluminum packaging.
news.summary: Today, Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL), a top provider of sustainable aluminum packaging for beverages, personal, and home care items, finalized a 49:51 joint venture agreement with Ayna.AI. This partnership marks a significant step for both companies as they aim to enhance their market presence and offerings.

news.headline: Stocks rise with record volume. 2025 high reached. Closing report from 03/21/2025.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.9% in the current year, which is a slight decrease from the previous estimate of 5.4%. This downward revision is primarily attributed to the ongoing supply chain disruptions and labor shortages caused by the pandemic. Advanced economies are expected to grow by 4.3% in 2022, while emerging and developing economies are projected to grow by 5.9%. Inflation is also anticipated to reach 3.6% globally, with advanced economies experiencing a higher rate of 4.3% compared to 3.2% in emerging and developing economies. These developments highlight the challenges that the global economy continues to face as it navigates through the complexities brought about by the pandemic.

news.headline: Exclusive Teen Vogue interview reveals Elon Musk's daughter, Vivian Wilson, sharing personal details. Get details on her life, interests, and thoughts on her father.
news.summary: Teen Vogue recently conducted a vibrant question-and-answer session with Vivian Wilson, delving into various aspects of her life and interests. The interview also touched upon her sentiments towards her well-known father.

Witkoff: Trump told Iran we should talk
Witkoff: Iran contacted after Trump letter
special envoy Witkoff speaks on Tucker Carlson podcast
CUPE released summaries of 9 education settlements with salary improvements of $3.65-$4.97 and 12.55%-17.81% increase.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, the Canadian Union of Public Employees disclosed details on the nine agreements reached and approved during the education support workers’ strike. Notable among these is CUPE 40 (Calgary Board of Education) with a term spanning 2024-2028. The agreement includes wage increases starting from September 1, 2024, with a 3% raise, followed by either a $1.25/hr increase or 3% raise (whichever is higher) on September 1, 2025. Subsequent increments include a 3% raise on September 1, 2026, and again either $1.25/hr or 3% (whichever is higher) on September 1, 2027, resulting in a dollar range improvement of $3.65-$4.97 and a percentage increase range of 12.55%-17.81%. Additionally, the subforman rate transitioned to forman as part of the agreement.

news.headline: Columbia capitulates to Trump's demands to regain funding, per reports.
Fed chair Powell needs clarity on Trump's agenda before rate cut for S&P 500; uncertainty looms.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve Chairman, Jerome Powell, is seeking more information on the Trump administration's agenda before considering a potential interest rate cut. However, he may not have the time to wait for complete clarity. The focus is on the upcoming Fed meeting and what crucial insights the S&P 500 index requires from Powell. It is essential for market participants to understand the Fed's stance amidst this uncertainty.

news.headline: Bitcoin miner achieves massive $266K reward processing a block independently, showcasing solo mining challenges.
news.summary: A single miner successfully mined another substantial reward in Bitcoin by independently processing a block. However, achieving this feat is quite challenging and requires considerable effort and expertise.

news.headline: Etrion released its 2024 financial results, including consolidated statements and MD&A, based in Geneva, Switzerland.
news.summary: Etrion Corporation, based in Geneva, Switzerland, revealed its annual consolidated financial statements and management’s discussion and analysis for the year ending on December 31, 2024. The report covers the Company and its subsidiaries' financial performance for the year. No specific numbers or figures were mentioned in the original article.

news.headline: Teck's 24th Sustainability Report shows 2024 performance in key areas - communities, Indigenous Peoples, health and safety, diversity, and climate.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 21, 2025, mining company Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A and TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) unveiled its 24th annual Sustainability Report. The report focuses on the company's achievements in 2024, covering crucial aspects such as community assistance, Indigenous Peoples outreach, health and safety measures, diversity initiatives, and environmental efforts. This demonstrates Teck's commitment to transparency and accountability across various pivotal areas.

news.headline: Saskatchewan calls on Carney to address impact of Chinese tariffs. #trade #Canada

Itaú Chile appoints Jorge Villa as CEO of its Colombian banking subsidiary, replacing Baruc Saez. Villa, former Vice President of Corporate Banking, takes over on March 21, after Saez's 5-year tenure.
news.summary: In Santiago, Chile, on March 21, 2025, BANCO ITAÚ CHILE (SSE: ITAUCL) announced changes in the Executive committee of its banking subsidiary in Colombia. Jorge Villa, former Vice President of Corporate Banking, has been appointed as the new CEO of Itaú Colombia, effective the same day. Villa takes over from Baruc Saez, who held the position for five years. This move aligns with Itaú's emphasis on meritocracy, showcasing internal talent.

news.headline: German regulator halts sales of Ethena's USDe stablecoin due to "serious deficiencies" in approval process.
news.summary: Regulators in Germany have intervened to halt the launch of Ethena's USDe stablecoin due to significant deficiencies in the approval process. The move comes after concerns were raised regarding the cryptocurrency's compliance with regulations. The decision has put a hold on the issuance of the stablecoin, which was expected to be launched soon. The German regulator's intervention highlights the increasing scrutiny faced by digital assets in the financial market.

news.headline: Final group of striking education workers (CUPE 5040 at Foothills School Division) vote 68% to accept settlement.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, the final group of striking education workers recently reached a decision regarding their settlement. Members of CUPE 5040 at the Foothills School Division voted with a majority of 68% in favor of accepting the settlement. This vote marks the conclusion of the negotiation process for the nine groups of education workers who were on strike.

news.headline: The Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art in Lakeland, Florida reveals Emma Holland as the 2025 Mayfaire by-the-Lake poster artist.
news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on March 21, 2025, The Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art (The AGB) located at Florida Southern College has announced Emma Holland as the Featured Poster Artist for the upcoming 2025 Mayfaire by-the-Lake event. This marks the 53rd year of the Mayfaire fine art celebration held by The AGB, showcasing Holland's artistic talent.

news.headline: Riot Platforms in talks to acquire assets of Rhodium, settlement includes mutual claims release.
news.summary: Riot Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIOT) has released a non-binding term sheet on March 21, 2025, proposing the acquisition of Rhodium Assets at the Rockdale Facility. The term sheet also includes a mutual release of all claims. Riot Platforms is a prominent player in the industry, known for its vertically integrated approach. The proposed acquisition and release of claims mark a significant development in the company's strategic growth plans.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. acquires 106,000 common shares of Avicanna Inc., representing 0.1% ownership, in recent transactions.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc., a Canadian venture capital firm, revealed that it had acquired a total of 106,000 common shares of Avicanna Inc. through recent transactions. This acquisition represented about 0.1% of all outstanding common shares of Avicanna Inc. The move increased the combined ownership percentage of ThreeD and Sheldon Inwentash above 2% on a partially diluted basis, marking a significant increase from their last early warning report. ThreeD Capital Inc. focuses on investing in companies in the junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors and is listed as CSE:IDK / OTCQX:IDKFF.

news.headline: RBAZ Bancorp, Inc. finalizes sale of assets to Pima Federal Credit Union; shareholders approve, closing set for May 2, 2025.
news.summary: On March 17, 2025, RBAZ Bancorp, Inc. has confirmed the sale of major assets and liabilities of Republic Bank of Arizona to Pima Federal Credit Union has secured all required regulatory approvals. The Purchase Agreement, dated May 16, 2024, between RBAZ, Republic Bank, and Pima Federal, has been approved by RBAZ shareholders. The Asset Sale is expected to be finalized on May 2, 2025, pending fulfillment of standard closing conditions outlined in the Purchase Agreement. The transfer marks a significant move in the financial sector, with this acquisition set to reshape the banking landscape.

news.headline: Glacier Media Inc. released 2024 year-end results, including revenue and earnings. TSX: GVC.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 21, 2025, Glacier Media Inc. (TSX: GVC) disclosed its financial figures for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Even the most pessimistic investors predict a rise in the stock market on Wall Street.
Eros Resources offers non-brokered private placement financing, not for US distribution.

news.headline: Leading Edge Materials releases Q1 financial results for January 31, 2025.
Coty Inc. sells 20% stake in SKKN by Kim to SKIMS, uniting beauty and lifestyle ventures; CEO comments.
news.summary: Coty Inc. has officially ended its partnership with Kim Kardashian and the SKKN by Kim brand by selling its 20% stake in the brand to SKIMS. This news comes as SKIMS plans to merge the beauty and lifestyle ventures into one brand. Anna von Bayern, CEO of Kylie Cosmetics and head of Kim Kardashian's beauty business at Coty, expressed her thoughts on the transaction. The company (Coty Inc.) is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: COTY) and the Euronext Paris exchange (Paris: COTY).

news.headline: Atea Pharmaceuticals releases statement on director nominations.
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that a total of 500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak in the city. This marks a significant increase from the previous count of 250 cases. Authorities have confirmed that the spike in numbers is due to a combination of factors, including increased testing and community spread of the virus. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and practice social distancing to curb the further spread of the virus. The situation is being closely monitored, and efforts are being made to provide adequate medical support to those in need.

news.headline: Chile maintains interest rate unchanged as Peso's rise eases inflation concerns.
Erdogan cautions opposition against mass protests.
